SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-09-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SUSAN ESPARZA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LEONA COOK. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. DEFENDANT LEONA COOK'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED AT THIS TIME. ADDITIONAL NOTICE OF THE NEXT HEARING DATE SHALL BE SENT TO DEFENDANT AT 430 E. O'KEEFE STREET, #315, PALO ALTO, CA 94303. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY ESPARZA, SUSAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $100.00 SERVED JUL-01-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, LEONA
REMARK: RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD Q
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. FILED BY DEFENDANT COOK, LEONA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-31-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESPARZA, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, LEONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT COOK, LEONA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COOK, LEONA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH MEYERS. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SUSAN ESPARZA & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE RICHARD SHANNON, CLAIMS ADJUSTER WITH PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE CO. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGES TO VENUE AND THE VALIDITY OF SERVICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT RETAINED EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT. JUDGE: PRO TEM: ELIZABETH MEYERS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPARZA, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOK, LEONA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,695.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF MEDICAL CO-PAYS AND LOST WAGES AND GENERAL DAMAGES. PROPERTY LOSS AND INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE WERE PREVIOUSLY REIMBURSED PRIOR TO TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
